name: Nodes by Kind
description: All nodes of a selected kind.
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:$kind }

name: Parties & Roles
description: All schema roles, GDPR parties, and battery regulation parties.

name: Protocols & Constraints
description: Protocol patterns and the constraints they satisfy.

name: On-chain Artifacts
description: Everything that lives on the Cardano ledger.
sparql:
PREFIX gbk: <https://lambdasistemi.github.io/graph-browser/vocab/kinds#>
SELECT ?node WHERE { ?node a gbk:artifact }

name: Obligations & Mechanisms
description: Regulatory obligations and the mechanisms that enforce them.

name: Case Studies
description: GDPR and Battery Regulation case studies and their connected elements.

name: Tensions & Resolutions
description: Regulatory tensions and what resolves them.

name: Hub Nodes
description: The most connected elements in the ontology.
